creator: kevinz5000@gmail.com
text:
The existing port in games/crossfire-client does not define a LICENSE. Crossfire is licensed under the GNU GPLv2, and the appropriate license needs to be defined in the Makefile.

Fix: Apply the attached patch to games/crossfire-client. A bump in PORTREVISION is probably not necessary, but the committer should decide for himself.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Install games/crossfire-client. The build process will report that no license has been defined.
